cells.rationale: Pure resolver module with a fully-specified contract and every union branch spelled out; correctness invariants (recycle identity, newest collapse) are clearly enumerated, so well-specified sonnet work at the model-default band.

Contract-touching per-harness argv/wire composition with byte-identical fresh-launch goldens and option-injection safety warrants xhigh, but it extends an existing descriptor pattern so sonnet suffices.
Multi-file CLI verb following the known Dispatch-union/route pattern with clear birth-record lineage rules; execution spans a few files on a clear path.

The load-bearing codex resume watermark is a subtle correctness invariant (a mis-anchored scan silently returns the pre-resume answer) cascading across seven capture/transcript/envelope files under byte-stable goldens.
Single-file SKILL.md prose rework with a fully-specified acceptance, but the framing/pruning and CONTEXT.md vocabulary judgment keep it on sonnet rather than the trickle lane.
